summary: Completed comprehensive testing of SISPPe document management features. Fixed critical bug: FolderOpen icon was not imported in 4 frontend pages causing navigation errors. All document APIs (GET/POST/DELETE for documentos-gestao and documentos-docentes) working correctly. UI navigation to all pages now functional.

fixed_bugs.issue: FolderOpen icon was not imported causing 'FolderOpen is not defined' runtime error
fixed_bugs.fix: Added FolderOpen to lucide-react imports in all affected files

context_for_next_testing_agent: All document management features tested and working. The FolderOpen import bug was fixed in 4 files. Object Storage integration is working correctly (not mocked). Document upload validates file types (PDF, DOC, DOCX, JPG, PNG only) and size (10MB max for gestao, 5MB for docentes). The escola login requires checking the terms checkbox before submitting.

mocked_apis.note: Object Storage is real (Emergent Object Storage). Email service via Resend is configured but depends on API key.
